name: capxon
tagline: Taiwan Leading Aluminum Electrolytic Capacitor Manufacturer
description: Capxon is a leading Taiwan manufacturer of high-quality aluminum electrolytic capacitors, providing reliable capacitor solutions for consumer electronics, industrial equipment, automotive electronics, and LED lighting applications.
longDescription: Founded in 1980 in Taiwan, Capxon has grown to become one of Asia's premier manufacturers of aluminum electrolytic capacitors. With over 40 years of expertise in capacitor technology, Capxon operates state-of-the-art manufacturing facilities equipped with fully automated production lines and comprehensive quality control systems. The company produces a wide range of capacitors including radial lead, snap-in, screw terminal, and SMD types, serving customers across 60+ countries. Capxon is known for its commitment to quality, innovation, and customer service, making it a trusted partner for electronics manufacturers worldwide. As an authorized distributor, LiTong Electronics provides comprehensive technical support and competitive pricing for Capxon products.

coreProducts.name: Radial Lead Capacitors
coreProducts.description: Standard radial aluminum electrolytic capacitors for general-purpose applications

coreProducts.name: Snap-in Capacitors
coreProducts.description: High-capacitance snap-in capacitors for power supply applications

coreProducts.name: SMD Capacitors
coreProducts.description: Surface mount aluminum electrolytic capacitors for compact designs

industries.name: Automotive Electronics
industries.description: EV charging, onboard electronics, LED lighting

seoTitle: Capxon Aluminum Electrolytic Capacitors | LiTong Electronics Authorized Distributor
seoDescription: Authorized distributor of Capxon aluminum electrolytic capacitors. Radial, snap-in, SMD, and automotive capacitors. Technical support and competitive pricing.

faqs.question: Is LiTong Electronics an authorized distributor of Capxon capacitors?
faqs.answer: Yes, LiTong Electronics is an authorized distributor of Capxon aluminum electrolytic capacitors. We have established a direct partnership with Capxon Electronics Industrial Co., Ltd., ensuring that all products we supply are genuine and backed by full manufacturer warranty. As an authorized distributor, we have access to Capxon's complete product portfolio, technical documentation, and engineering support. We maintain regular stock of popular series and can provide factory-direct lead times for specialized requirements.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact our sales team to verify our distributor credentials or request a quotation for Capxon products.

faqs.question: What are Capxon's core competencies in capacitor manufacturing?
faqs.answer: Capxon's core competencies include over 40 years of capacitor manufacturing experience, vertically integrated production from raw materials to finished products, advanced automated manufacturing lines, comprehensive quality control systems, and strong R&D capabilities. The company specializes in high-reliability capacitors for demanding applications, with particular strength in automotive-grade products meeting AEC-Q200 standards. Capxon's manufacturing facilities in Taiwan ensure consistent quality and reliable supply chain management.
faqs.decisionGuide: For applications requiring high reliability and consistent quality, Capxon capacitors offer excellent value. Contact our FAE team for technical recommendations.

faqs.question: How does Capxon compare to other capacitor brands?
faqs.answer: Capxon offers competitive advantages in terms of quality-to-price ratio, consistent Taiwan manufacturing, shorter lead times for Asian markets, and strong technical support. Compared to Japanese brands, Capxon provides similar quality at more competitive pricing. Compared to mainland Chinese brands, Capxon offers higher consistency and better quality control. The company's 40+ year history and ISO certifications demonstrate its commitment to quality. Capxon is particularly strong in consumer electronics and industrial applications where cost-effectiveness and reliability are both important.
faqs.decisionGuide: For cost-sensitive applications requiring reliable performance, Capxon provides an excellent balance of quality and price. Request samples to evaluate in your application.

faqs.question: What industries and applications are Capxon capacitors best suited for?
faqs.answer: Capxon capacitors are widely used in consumer electronics (TVs, audio equipment, home appliances), industrial equipment (power supplies, inverters, motor drives), automotive electronics (EV charging, onboard systems), and LED lighting applications. The company's radial lead capacitors are popular in consumer electronics, while snap-in types are favored for industrial power supplies. Their automotive-grade capacitors meet AEC-Q200 standards for vehicle applications. Capxon's SMD capacitors are ideal for compact consumer electronics designs.
faqs.decisionGuide: Browse our product catalog by application or contact our FAE team for application-specific recommendations.

faqs.question: What certifications does Capxon hold for quality assurance?
faqs.answer: Capxon holds multiple international certifications including ISO 9001 for Quality Management Systems, ISO 14001 for Environmental Management, IATF 16949 for Automotive Quality Management, and AEC-Q200 qualification for automotive-grade capacitors. These certifications demonstrate Capxon's commitment to quality, environmental responsibility, and meeting stringent automotive industry requirements. All manufacturing facilities are regularly audited to maintain these certifications, ensuring consistent product quality.
faqs.decisionGuide: For applications requiring certified quality systems, Capxon's comprehensive certifications provide assurance. Contact us for certification documentation.

faqs.question: What are the advantages of purchasing Capxon capacitors through LiTong Electronics?
faqs.answer: Purchasing Capxon capacitors through LiTong Electronics provides several advantages: guaranteed genuine products with full manufacturer warranty, competitive pricing through our distributor partnership, local technical support from our experienced FAE team, shorter lead times with local inventory, flexible payment terms, and comprehensive logistics support. We also provide value-added services including application engineering support, sample evaluation, and custom sourcing for specialized requirements. Our direct relationship with Capxon ensures you receive the best support and service.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact our sales team to discuss your requirements and learn about our competitive pricing and support services for Capxon products.

faqs.question: Does Capxon offer custom capacitor solutions for specialized applications?
faqs.answer: Yes, Capxon offers custom capacitor solutions for specialized applications including custom capacitance values, voltage ratings, size configurations, and performance characteristics. The company's engineering team can work with customers to develop capacitors meeting specific application requirements. Custom solutions may include extended temperature ranges, enhanced ripple current capability, or special termination configurations. Minimum order quantities and lead times apply for custom products. LiTong Electronics can facilitate communication with Capxon's engineering team for custom requirements.
faqs.decisionGuide: For custom capacitor requirements, contact our FAE team with your specifications. We will coordinate with Capxon engineering to evaluate feasibility and provide quotation.
